options.text: You gain strength, but you lose things in return.

items.speaker: Aeolus
items.text: Must be a price too heavy for me to take.

items.speaker: Aeolus
items.text: But most people lose everything and still gain no strength.

dialog.stepLabel: Hunter's Phantom: "Did you hear that noise? That girl is hunting the Lion Beast..."

items.speaker: Hunter's Phantom
items.text: Did you hear that noise? That girl is hunting the Lion Beast all by herself. A fight like that is bound to attract more danger. Even if she takes it down, she'll need backup.

items.speaker: Hunter's Phantom
items.text: We have to help her... Are you hurt?

items.speaker: Rolla
items.text: The Lion Beast and a girl... Could this be the moment when Ephor Augusta hunted it down?

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: (But the tale of Augusta's trial only mentions an old hunter. Who's this second person?)

dialog.stepLabel: Rolla: "This place… Looks like it used to be a smithy...."

items.speaker: Rolla
items.text: This place… Looks like it used to be a smithy.

items.speaker: Aeolus
items.text: The best you could find on the Plateaus.

items.speaker: Aeolus
items.text: For a Gladiator, their weapon is their second life. This was where many first came, when they set out to chase greatness.

items.speaker: Aeolus
items.text: I got my first sword here too. Many years ago.

items.speaker: Rolla
items.text: Really? But I've never seen you use it. Did you treasure it that much?
